testcases.input: palindrome = "abccba" Output: "aaccba" Explanation: There are many ways to make "abccba" not a palindrome, such as "zbccba", "aaccba", and "abacba". Of all the ways, "aaccba" is the lexicographically smallest.
testcases.expectedOutput: "aaccba" Explanation: There are many ways to make "abccba" not a palindrome, such as "zbccba", "aaccba", and "abacba". Of all the ways, "aaccba" is the lexicographically smallest.

testcases.input: palindrome = "a" Output: "" Explanation: There is no way to replace a single character to make "a" not a palindrome, so return an empty string.
testcases.expectedOutput: "" Explanation: There is no way to replace a single character to make "a" not a palindrome, so return an empty string.
